import re, sys

files = ['public/biznes.html', 'public/kalkulator-wynagrodzen.html', 'public/kariera.html', 'public/subskrypcja.html']
old = \\"  function uNavLogout\(\){\\n    localStorage.removeItem\('dokumo_user'\);\\n    localStorage.removeItem\('dokumo_sub'\);\\n    window.location.href='index.html';\\n  }\\"
new = \\"  function uNavLogout\(\){\\n    localStorage.removeItem\('dokumo_user'\);\\n    localStorage.removeItem\('dokumo_sub'\);\\n    \(window._fbSignOut?window._fbSignOut\(\):Promise.resolve\(\)\).finally\(\(\)=>{window.location.href='index.html';}\);\\n  }\\"

for f in files:
    content = open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)
    if old in content:
        open\(f, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\).write\(content.replace\(old, new\)\)
        print\('Fixed:', f\)
    else:
        print\('Not found in:', f\)
")

h2pdf_src = "https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/html2pdf.js/0.10.1/html2pdf.bundle.min.js"

# The WRONG new style I introduced
bad_style = "<style>*{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;padding:2.5cm;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:12pt;line-height:1.7;color:#111;width:794px}pre{white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;font-family:inherit;font-size:11pt}</style>"
# The ORIGINAL style
orig_style = "<style>body{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;font-size:12pt;line-height:1.7;margin:2.5cm;color:#111}pre{white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;font-family:inherit;font-size:11pt}@media print{body{margin:2cm}}</style>"

files = [
    'public/admin.html',
    'public/hr.html',
    'public/ecommerce.html',
    'public/wypowiedzenia.html',
    'public/moje-dokumenty.html',
    'public/dokumenty.html',
]

for f in files:
    c = open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)
    if bad_style in c:
        c = c.replace\(bad_style, orig_style\)
        open\(f, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\).write\(c\)
        print\('Reverted style in:', f\)
    else:
        print\('Style not found in:', f\)
PYEOF)

# For the html2pdf call, also capture from pre element with proper margins
# matching the original 2.5cm body margin
old_h2pdf = ".from\(document.body\).save\(\)"
new_h2pdf = ".from\(document.body.firstElementChild\).save\(\)"

files = [
    'public/admin.html',
    'public/hr.html',
    'public/ecommerce.html',
    'public/wypowiedzenia.html',
    'public/moje-dokumenty.html',
    'public/dokumenty.html',
]

for f in files:
    c = open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)
    if old_h2pdf in c:
        c = c.replace\(old_h2pdf, new_h2pdf\)
        open\(f, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\).write\(c\)
        print\('Fixed capture in:', f\)
    else:
        print\('Not found in:', f\)

Bash(cd C:/Users/asus/Desktop/dokumo && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re

# Replace margin:0 with margin:25 in the html2pdf set call \(for text docs\)
# and update window.open to use specified width
files = [
    'public/admin.html',
    'public/hr.html',
    'public/ecommerce.html',
    'public/wypowiedzenia.html',
    'public/moje-dokumenty.html',
    'public/dokumenty.html',
]

old_margin = 'html2pdf\(\).set\({margin:0,filename:'
new_margin = 'html2pdf\(\).set\({margin:25,filename:'

for f in files:
    c = open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)
    # Only replace in the win.document.write context \(inside string\)
    # Count occurrences
    count = c.count\(old_margin\)
    if count > 0:
        c = c.replace\(old_margin, new_margin\)
        open\(f, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\).write\(c\)
        print\(f'Fixed {count}x margin in: {f}'\)
    else:
        print\('Not found in:', f\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw
import math

img = Image.open\("C:/Users/asus/Desktop/logo2.jpg"\).convert\("RGBA"\)
w, h = img.size
print\(f"Size: {w}x{h}"\)

# Circular crop - center of the green circle is roughly at center of image
# The green circle takes up about 65% of the image width
cx, cy = w // 2, int\(h * 0.52\)
radius = int\(w * 0.38\)

mask = Image.new\("L", \(w, h\), 0\)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(mask\)
draw.ellipse\([cx - radius, cy - radius, cx + radius, cy + radius], fill=255\)

result = Image.new\("RGBA", \(w, h\), \(0, 0, 0, 0\)\)
result.paste\(img, mask=mask\)

# Crop to bounding box of the circle
bbox = \(cx - radius, cy - radius, cx + radius, cy + radius\)
result = result.crop\(bbox\)
result.save\("C:/Users/asus/Desktop/dokumo/public/logo2.png", "PNG"\)
print\("Saved logo2.png"\)
PYEOF)

from PIL import Image, ImageDraw

img = Image.open\("C:/Users/asus/Desktop/logo2.jpg"\).convert\("RGBA"\)
w, h = img.size

# Even tighter - cut out the stacked papers on left and folders on right
cx, cy = int\(w * 0.45\), int\(h * 0.50\)
radius = int\(w * 0.22\)

mask = Image.new\("L", \(w, h\), 0\)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(mask\)
draw.ellipse\([cx - radius, cy - radius, cx + radius, cy + radius], fill=255\)

result = Image.new\("RGBA", \(w, h\), \(0, 0, 0, 0\)\)
result.paste\(img, mask=mask\)

bbox = \(cx - radius, cy - radius, cx + radius, cy + radius\)
result = result.crop\(bbox\)
result.save\("C:/Users/asus/Desktop/dokumo/public/logo2.png", "PNG"\)
print\("Saved"\)
PYEOF)
